message:
fix: clamp board detail scroll, bound time-travel cursor, case-insensitive recipe labels

Three bugs from agent code review:

1. tui.rs board detail scroll: The rendering used the unclamped
   board_detail_scroll_offset, while the footer showed the clamped
   value. Now uses the clamped offset for both, preventing scroll
   past content end when detail content shrinks.

2. tui.rs time-travel issue cursor: j-key in detail focus incremented
   time_travel_issue_cursor without bounds checking, causing the
   selection marker to disappear when cursor exceeded category size.
   Now clamps to the current category's issue count.

3. recipe.rs label filter: Used case-sensitive == comparison for recipe
   label matching while other label comparisons use eq_ignore_ascii_case.
   Now consistent with the rest of the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
